prompt: A steampunk airship soaring above cloud-covered mountains
prompt_refined: Generate an artwork depicting a steampunk airship, matching the design and aesthetic of the airship shown in image 1. This airship should be prominently featured, soaring high and centrally in the sky. Below the airship, a vast landscape of rugged mountains is partially obscured by dense, rolling clouds. The scene should convey a sense of adventure and atmospheric depth.
